name: Cereal Bran Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Measure the cereal and milk into a mixing bowl. Stir to combine.
3. Add the egg whites and oil. Let stand one or two minutes to soften the cereal.
4. Mix the flours, baking powder, and sugar in a separate bowl.
5. Beat the liquid-cereal mixture with a wire whisk.
6. Add the dry ingredients to the cereal mixture, stirring only until combined.
7. Spoon the batter gently into lightly oiled or paper-lined muffin tins.
8. Bake for 25 minutes. Makes 12 muffins.
